ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., junior, adult, plus) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of size (e.g., petite, tall, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "length_in" REAL /* Length of the clothing item in inches */,
  "bust_in" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_in" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_in" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_in" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "clothing_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the clothing item (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, skirts) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the clothing item belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "body_length_in" REAL /* User's body length in inches */,
  "body_bust_in" REAL /* User's bust measurement in inches */,
  "body_shoulder_in" REAL /* User's shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "body_sleeve_in" REAL /* User's sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "preferred_fit" TEXT /* User's preferred fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "preferred_brands" TEXT /* User's preferred brands (comma-separated) */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* User's preferred categories (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being recommended */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "fit_accuracy" REAL /* Fit accuracy score (0.0 to 1.0, where 1.0 is a perfect fit) */,
  " recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., body measurements, purchase history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the clothing item (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)
